title: NORTHWEST OREGON HOUSING AUTHORITY - 211info
text: NORTHWEST OREGON HOUSING AUTHORITY NORTHWEST OREGON HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Administers federal housing programs. Maintains a list of affordable housing and a bulletin board of local properties, including subsidized properties that are independently managed. Fields complaints about public housing and Section 8 housing. 147 S Main Avenue Warrenton, OR 97146 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm; by appointment only Email (503) 861-0119 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 861-0119 Toll-free (888) 887-4990 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more information FEES: Rent amount varies by program DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clatsop, Columbia, and Tillamook Counties Services: Elderly/Disabled Home Rental Listings Government Subsidized Private Rental Housing Listings Housing Complaints * Public Housing Residents Housing Complaints * Section 8 Housing Residents Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing Public Housing Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Section 8/Rental Assistance Program Rental Listings Subsidized Housing Administrative Organizations If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTHWEST OREGON HOUSING AUTHORITY
